feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Love Me (Not Too Hard)
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,198Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: But it was definitely affecting him in a bad way. Hard day at work? Go have sex to feel better. Bobby yell at him for screwing up again? Find an old guy to tell him he’s good for something. See a happy family on a call and remember he hasn’t spoken to Maddie in seven years? Blackout so he doesn’t have to be reminded of that gaping wound. It was really bad. Yeah. But like, privately bad. Secretly bad. Except for his roommates, who were starting to get pissed about him stumbling around drunk with his guests. So, he started to look for a new apartment in earnest. And just when he was starting to think things were getting actually concerning, and pretty soon he wouldn’t even remember what the point of anything was, who walked into the fire station, looking perfect and attractive and ready to change Buck’s life? Eddie fucking Diaz.   or: Buck's sex addiction taken seriously.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: tentacles
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,359Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Bioluminescent algae clung to the walls in soft, blue-green patches, providing an eerie, beautiful light. In the centre was a deep, still pool, fed by some hidden channel to the sea. And in the centre of that pool, resting on a flat, dry rock, was him. He was breathtaking. Human from the waist up—all taut, golden-brown skin, broad shoulders, and a face of sharp, beautiful angles. But from the hips down… eight powerful, flexible tentacles, their colour shifting like an oil slick in the dim light, rested in the water or curled against the rock. They were sheer muscle, adorned here and there with delicate, fin-like ridges. His head tilted, brown eyes almost innocent in the dim light. /// Away from his college friends, Buck was taken by a beautiful... merman?

entry.title: dust to dust
entry.summary:
Author: charmingqueenie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,897Chapters: 12/13Kudos: 67

Summary: Eddie leans back, gesturing for Bobby to get started. Bobby sighs, pulling off his glasses. "So how did you… become this?" Eddie cocks his head. "You can say the word." "I- uh." Bobby clears his throat. "How did you become a vampire?" or IWTV Buddie AU

entry.title: Twins from Hell
entry.summary:
Author: Nightskydeer

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,954Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Eddie Diaz, the Uber driver/firefighter from El Paso, has been saved from the Djinn that had kidnapped him and is now in his best friend(?)’s good hands. Sam and Dean report back that they’re safe and coming home as soon as possible, so now Eileen and Castiel can relax. When anger dissipates, curiosity takes over: Who are these two firefighters? Why did their husbands get so attached to them? And why in the ever-loving fuck were they kidnapped by a guy who looks identical to Lucifer’s vessel?   Second installment to my Supernatural/9-1-1 crossover series (direct sequel to Sweet, sweet dreams)

entry.title: For Life.
entry.summary:
Author: power_moves

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,805Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 196

Summary: "Buck didn't have a daughter. Sure, he loved kids and maybe one day he would build his own little family, but not right now. He just couldn't bear this type of responsibility - the kind that demanded more than he was able to give, more than he thought he could handle.Then one phone call suddenly changed everything.A number he didn't recognize. A professional voice talking to him, her words not making sense. "Her birth certificate states that you're her father."" Or Buck learns he has a seventeen year old daughter that just lost her mom and is now supposed to live with him. TW: old injuries, pain, emotional distress, loss of a parent

entry.title: Unexpected visitors
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,929Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 289

Summary: “Well one of her old friends still lives in Hershey and you know, they talked and Maddie mentioned the pregnancy-““Still perfectly normal.”“And her friend ran into your parents at the store and told them about the pregnancy.”Buck froze.“And I mean you know, you know Maddie hasn’t spoken to them since she found out about… you know.”“The Jakeman thing.”“Yeah, yeah the Jakeman thing. She blocked their number. And even before that she didn’t ever talk to them about you really I mean- she never even told them about Rina or your leg or anything she- she’s totally been respecting your right to not want them in your life-““Chim. What exactly happened this morning?”“They must have used a new number to try and call Maddie because they got through.”“… Okay. Okay so my parents called. That’s… not great but-““They called to tell us that they’re in LA.”“They-“ Buck blinked once. Twice.He swallowed hard.“They’re in LA?” ...In which the Buckley parents come to town. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,703Chapters: 9/365Kudos: 31

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

entry.title: My Dreams Are Just Dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Feybird395

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,932Chapters: 1/11Kudos: 11

Summary: Evan Buckley was nine years old the day he disappeared. It takes eleven years of hell to get the courage to escape the organisation that raised him. It'll take years more before he finally feels like a person again, for the ghosts of his past to stop haunting his every move. He becomes Buck, becomes a firefighter, finds a family, a sister, and two best friends. And then when he's thirty-one, Chris is taken. And if he wants to get him back, he'll need to face the past he thought he'd finally escaped. (OR: A Red Room, Assassin AU)

entry.title: Unbroken
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,111Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 119

Summary: Evan Buckley was a donor baby, and when his job was done, when his brother survived, the Buckley's gave him away, leaving Evan bouncing through the foster system. Years later, he thought he had found his home, the love of his life in Liam Parks, only to realize he had traded one nightmare for another, this time suffering with isolation and abuse. Now, Evan is Buck. He works for the LAFD, and a single father fiercely protecting his daughter, Mila. Suddenly, Buck is pulled into the loud, loyal life of the 118, his dangerously attractive coworker Eddie, and a found family he never thought he was allowed to have. Just as the walls start to come down, and Buck started to feel safe. Buck's past starts catching up to him. Or, Buck had a rough childhood, and an even worse marriage full of abuse. He runs to Los Angeles with his daughter and he finds his place in the 118, and falls for his actual love of his life Eddie. He meets new people on the way that show him what love really is.

entry.title: neon sign
entry.summary:
Author: nermle

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,351Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: Eddie grew up around shit like this. He recognizes it, the subtle insinuation, the thing the sheriff is not-so-subtly dancing around. It's the idea that the spouse is always the first suspect, and he knows what he means when he talks about his wife's nickname for him in response to Eddie correcting him on Buck's name. He hears the invisible quotation marks around the word friend. He lived in Texas and spent enough time in the Army not to miss the comment about his wings. He just doesn't care anymore, because it doesn't matter. Buck is hurt. He has to be, because he was in a car crash, and if Eddie is this sore and beaten up, then Buck has to be in a similar condition. And if he's not in the hospital, he's either on the side of the road alone and afraid, or someone took him. And he's just so fucking tired of defending his heterosexuality, so he doesn't. Because who cares? Fuck that homophobic sheriff and this entire homophobic town. Eddie doesn't care what they think. All he cares about is getting out of this hospital and finding Buck. He knows he can't rest until he's got his fingers on Buck's pulse again.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Don't Leave Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: itsbooelle

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,320Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 5

Summary: After Bobby's death, everyone is struggling. On a rainy shift, with everyone in their own particular bad moods, it seems to come to a head. When the road is washed out from under them, each member of the 118 has to face their own misgivings and misconceptions before they run out of time.

entry.title: because you have to
entry.summary:
Author: avidreader0202

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,904Chapters: 4/12Kudos: 28

Summary: After years of chaos, Buck has finally built the life he once thought was impossible: a soulmate he gets to call his husband, three kids who are his entire universe, and a new beginning in LA that feels like hope. But just when everything settles, a diagnosis shatters the illusion of safety and forces Buck to confront the fight of his life. The fic where Buck is diagnosed with cancer and has to fight for the future he always wanted — and the family that refuses to let him face it alone.

entry.title: If You Give an Eddie a Cookie
entry.summary:
Author: asyztole

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,873Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: “There’s a vagina,” Eddie whispers. “I have a fucking vagina!” He can’t take it anymore. Eddie takes a deep breath. “I’m going to get dressed,” he says, “And then– and then, I don’t know what, but we’re going to be normal and figure this out.” “I’m being normal,” Buck argues, still sitting on the floor in front of the couch like an idiot. He smiles at Eddie brightly and the sun shines through the window in a way that makes his hair look golden – thoughts that would have never occurred to him before now. It has a mind of it’s own and it’s getting to his fucking brain. “No, you’re looking at my vagina like you want to fuck it. Stop doing that. You don’t get to fuck my vagina.”   Or, Eddie Diaz gets a cookie.

entry.title: Mother Knows Best
entry.summary:
Author: afternooncupoftea

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,213Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: ”You think Eddie was going to get me flowers? Flowers that symbolize love?”“You did say he put them back when he saw you. Maybe he wasn’t expecting to see you, so he panicked and backed out.”“But why would he buy me flowers?”“Because he loves you, Buck.”Or Buck buys flowers for Athena every other week. He runs into Eddie buying flowers as well. Eddie never told Buck that he’s seeing someone.

entry.title: Title
entry.summary:
Author: not-blonde-yet (stillredhead_just_tired)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,644Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 206

Summary: The universe has a funny way of balancing its books. For every week Buck spends being genuinely happy, life eventually decides it's time to correct the course. A trip to Nashville for the National Firefighter Games seemed like a nice break -until Buck runs into a ghost from his past: Dixie, the country singer he spent one summer with a decade ago.Or: the one where Buck wants a title, Eddie is terrible at feelings, and everyone at the Firefighter Games already thinks they're married.

entry.title: And If I Drown, What Then?
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 64,356Chapters: 17/30Kudos: 889

Summary: "Yeah, well, we have—moved on." Eddie's expression didn’t soften. "You should too, Buck." He deflated, the fight draining out of him. For the first time since they met, Buck felt like he was staring at a stranger. “Uh— yeah I get it,” he finally said. “And I really am sorry.” He watched as Eddie's figure retreated. If Buck had stayed quiet, maybe he could have kept pretending that time would heal this wound. After that disaster of a conversation, Buck wasn't sure it ever would. He stood there, windows forgotten, feeling something he’d known his whole life shift into place. Buck never thought Eddie would be the one to show him he was right.   Or A Buck and Eddie post-lawsuit fic. ----------- Please heed the tags! This fic explores alcohol and substance abuse and may be triggering for some readers. If these themes are difficult for you, please put yourself first.

entry.title: there goes my heart beating (cause you are the reason)
entry.summary:
Author: cleverly

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,383Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 265

Summary: Buck finally sees him, his pupils blown wide, his lips red from sucking on Buck’s neck. “Fuck, I don’t know what I need. I feel insane right now. I just need to see, you know? I need proof of the blood pumping underneath your skin.” “And you decided a hickey was the only way to do that?” Buck laughs, a tad hysterical. Eddie responds by pressing his finger against the hickey beginning to form on his neck. Buck hisses at the touch and, in the dim light, Eddie’s eyes seem to get even darker. Hungrier. Buck is so fucked.Or, Eddie becomes obsessed with checking Buck's pulse after New Mexico. It quickly escalates, when checking with his hands isn't enough anymore.
